📋 Event Overview

Bologna vs Verona takes place at Stadio Renato Dall Ara on 2026-03-08 as part of the Italian Serie A. Tickets available from USD53.1.

Stadio Renato Dall Ara is one of the premier sporting venues in Stadio Renato Dall Ara, offering fans an unforgettable atmosphere. This Football event is part of the Italian Serie A season and attracts supporters from across the country.

Tickets for Bologna vs Verona are available from $53 per ticket. We compare prices across all major resale and official platforms so you can find the best deal without the hassle.
